refs.description: Folly's ProducerConsumerQueue is a lock-free single-producer/single-consumer ring buffer using atomic read/write indices that wrap at capacity.
The Linux kernel tracing subsystem uses a per-CPU ring buffer with head/tail/commit pages and an overwrite mode for lockless event recording.
Production C++ infrastructure code at Meta wraps the read and write indices modulo size_ to implement the circular queue without locks.
